sql.i: INSERT INTO abs_material_info (rowguid, name, type, size, category, duration, word_count, tags, content, file_path, upload_time, status, create_user) VALUES ({rowguid}, {name}, {type}, {size}, {category}, {duration}, {wordCount}, {tags}, {content}, {filePath}, {uploadTime}, {status}, {createUser})
SELECT rowguid, name, type, size, category, duration, word_count, tags, content, file_path, upload_time, status, create_user FROM abs_material_info WHERE rowguid = {rowguid}

SELECT rowguid, name, type, size, category, duration, word_count, tags, content, file_path, upload_time, status, create_user FROM abs_material_info WHERE 1=1 $equal(name, name) $equal(type, type) $equal(category, category) $like(tags, tags) $equal(status, status) ORDER BY upload_time DESC $limit(pageNum, pageSize)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM abs_material_info WHERE 1=1 $equal(name, name) $equal(type, type) $equal(category, category) $like(tags, tags) $equal(status, status)

SELECT rowguid, name, type, size, category, duration, word_count, tags, content, file_path, upload_time, status, create_user FROM abs_material_info WHERE type = {type} $equal(category, category) $like(name, name) $equal(status, status) ORDER BY upload_time DESC $limit(pageNum, pageSize)
